reforms.description: Turkey streamlined its various R&D incentive schemes based on cost-benefit analyses to improve the take-up and efficiency of tax subsidies and grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the efficiency of R&D funding can lead to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government announced plans to streamline R&D incentives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant improvement in the governance of R&D funding, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: Streamline the various R&D incentives schemes on the basis of cost-benefit analyses, and build on international best practices to improve take-up and efficiency of tax subsidies and grants.

reforms.description: Turkey adopted a new law on Industrial Property Rights to enhance intellectual property protection, which includes specific chapters on patents and trademarks.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved intellectual property protection encourages innovation and investment by providing firms with better security for their inventions.
reforms.status_evidence: A new Law on Industrial Property Rights entered into force in 2017.
reforms.importance_rationale: This law represents a comprehensive overhaul of the intellectual property framework, which is essential for fostering innovation and protecting creators' rights.
reforms.source_quote: A new Law on Industrial Property Rights entered into force in 2017, replacing all existing decree laws in this area with a single compact law.

reforms.description: Turkey's start-up ecosystem is being developed to enhance support for innovative firms, focusing on incubators and accelerators to foster entrepreneurship.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening the start-up ecosystem is expected to boost innovation and create jobs, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The development of the start-up ecosystem has been officially announced as a priority.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the entrepreneurial landscape, which is crucial for innovation and economic diversification.
reforms.source_quote: Turkey's start-up eco-system is being developed to enhance support for innovative firms.

reforms.description: The treasury-backed credit guarantee fund (KGF) aims to facilitate access to finance for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), thereby supporting innovation and investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to finance, the KGF is expected to stimulate investment in innovative projects, enhancing overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The establishment of the KGF has been officially announced to support SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This fund represents a significant tool for enhancing financial support for SMEs, which are vital for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The treasury-backed credit guarantee fund (KGF) aims to facilitate access to finance for small and medium-sized enterprises.

reforms.description: The government has committed to bringing Turkey’s framework for doing business closer to international good practice, which includes initiatives aimed at accelerating digital innovations and improving firm performance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the business environment and promoting digital innovations can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness among firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has committed to bringing Turkey’s framework for doing business closer to international good practice.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to modernise the business environment, which is crucial for enhancing firm performance and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The government has committed to bringing Turkey’s framework for doing business closer to international good practice.

reforms.description: The Turkish government established a Platform for the Digital Transformation of Industry, involving various business organizations to prepare policy-oriented reports on key trends in digital technologies and advanced manufacturing.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to enhance the technological capabilities of firms, which can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness in the global market.
reforms.status_evidence: The platform was created and working groups were established to address various aspects of digital transformation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to coordinate and promote digital transformation across industries, which is crucial for enhancing Turkey's technological landscape.
reforms.source_quote: A Platform for the Digital Transformation of Industry was created with the participation of several business organisations under the aegis of the Ministry of Science, Industry and Technology.

reforms.description: The Coordination Council for Improvement of the Investment Environment implemented an omnibus bill (Law No.7099 of March 2018) to ease procedures and reduce costs in major business areas, including property registration.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing administrative burdens, the reform is expected to enhance the business environment, thereby encouraging investment and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The omnibus bill was put into force to improve business procedures.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at improving the overall investment climate, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Coordination Council for Improvement of the Investment Environment (YOIKK) put in force an omnibus bill (Law No.7099 of March 2018) to further ease procedures and reduce costs in all major doing business areas.

reforms.description: Turkey's SME Agency KOSGEB has initiated new programmes aimed at enhancing the engineering and design capabilities of very small firms, which have traditionally been underserved by innovation support mechanisms.
reforms.package_name: KOSGEB Support Initiative for Small Firms
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the engineering and design capabilities of very small firms, the initiative aims to enhance their competitiveness and productivity, fostering innovation in the sector.
reforms.status_evidence: KOSGEB has recently started to develop programmes for very small firms, including in service businesses.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step towards addressing the needs of a large segment of the business sector that has been historically neglected, potentially leading to improved innovation outcomes.
reforms.source_quote: Turkey’s SME Agency KOSGEB has traditionally directed its programmes to relatively larger manufacturing SMEs... but has recently started to develop programmes for very small firms.

reforms.description: The Turkish government has developed several schemes to support high-technology start-ups, including the Techno-Entrepreneurship Grant Programme, which offers seed capital to eligible firms, and grants that subsidize R&D costs for technology start-ups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives enhance the capacity of start-ups to innovate and grow, contributing positively to the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has actively supported high-technology start-ups through various funding schemes.
reforms.importance_rationale: These schemes represent a significant effort to foster innovation and entrepreneurship in the high-tech sector, although they are part of a broader ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The Turkish government, together with large firms and universities, has developed several schemes to support high-technology start-ups over the past decade.

reforms.description: The Treasury programme provides direct subsidies to entrepreneurs with innovative technological ideas, significantly increasing the number of applicants receiving support.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support to innovative entrepreneurs, the programme encourages the development of new technologies and business models.
reforms.status_evidence: In 2015, around 70% of the applicants received support.
reforms.importance_rationale: This programme is a significant component of the broader support for start-ups, enhancing their ability to innovate.
reforms.source_quote: A Treasury programme provides direct subsidies to entrepreneurs with innovative technological ideas.

reforms.description: The Turkish authorities have introduced several streams of low-interest loan and grant schemes for SMEs and start-ups to enhance their access to financing, particularly in light of increasing debt levels among firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These schemes are designed to improve access to finance for innovative firms, which can enhance their growth potential and contribute to overall economic development.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has expanded lending activities to support SMEs and start-ups.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to address financing gaps for SMEs and start-ups, which are crucial for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: New government initiatives include the massive extension of credit guarantees and several streams of low-interest loan and grant schemes for SMEs and start-ups.
